languages.text: "Промежутки между осознанием правды становятся все дольше. Раньше я доходил до своей тайны примерно раз в два месяца. Вскоре это превратилось в четыре. Сейчас это занимает вплоть до восьми. Это свидетельствует о том, что детериорация разума усугубляется". {n}Бесцветный взгляд поднимается на вас.{/n} "Пока что я не смог обнаружить эффективный способ справиться с этим. Я не знаю найду ли его вообще".

"The intervals between my realising the truth are becoming longer all the time. I used to uncover my secret about once every two months. That quickly turned into four. Now it takes as long as eight. This shows that the deterioration of my mind is accelerating." {n}He raises his colourless gaze to you.{/n} "So far, I have failed to find an effective countermeasure. I do not know if I will ever find one."

Сейчас это занимает вплоть до восьми. Это свидетельствует о том, что детериорация разума усугубляется". {n}Бесцветный взгляд поднимается на вас.{/n} "Пока что я не смог обнаружить эффективный способ справиться с этим. Я не знаю найду ли его вообще".

I do not know if I will ever find one."

I do not know if I will ever find one."

"The intervals between my realising the truth are becoming longer all the time. I used to uncover my secret about once every two months. That quickly turned into four. Now it takes as long as eight. This shows that the deterioration of my mind is accelerating." {n}He raises his colourless gaze to you.{/n} "So far, I have failed to find an effective countermeasure. I do not know if I will ever find one."

languages.text: «Los intervalos hasta que me doy cuenta de la verdad son cada vez más largos. Originalmente, descubría mi propio secreto en unos dos meses. Pronto pasaron a ser cuatro, y ahora llego a los ocho. Eso demuestra que el deterioro de mi mente se está acelerando». {n}Te dirige una mirada desprovista de vitalidad.{/n} «Por el momento, no he encontrado una contramedida adecuada. No sé si llegaré a hacerlo».
languages.original_text: "The intervals between my realising the truth are becoming longer all the time. I used to uncover my secret about once every two months. That quickly turned into four. Now it takes as long as eight. This shows that the deterioration of my mind is accelerating." {n}He raises his colourless gaze to you.{/n} "So far, I have failed to find an effective countermeasure. I do not know if I will ever find one."

traits.locale_text: «Los intervalos hasta que me doy cuenta de la verdad son cada vez más largos. Originalmente, descubría mi propio secreto en unos dos meses. Pronto pasaron a ser cuatro, y ahora llego a los ocho. Eso demuestra que el deterioro de mi mente se está acelerando». {n}Te dirige una mirada desprovista de vitalidad.{/n} «Por el momento, no he encontrado una contramedida adecuada. No sé si llegaré a hacerlo».

languages.text: “我每次意识到真相之后的间隔越来越长了。过去，我大概每两个月就能揭开一次自己的秘密。很快，这个时间变成了四个月。现在则长达八个月。这表明我心智的退化正在加速。”{n}他抬起黯淡的目光看向你。{/n}“目前为止，我都没找到有效的应对措施，也不知道还能不能找得到。”
languages.original_text: "The intervals between my realising the truth are becoming longer all the time. I used to uncover my secret about once every two months. That quickly turned into four. Now it takes as long as eight. This shows that the deterioration of my mind is accelerating." {n}He raises his colourless gaze to you.{/n} "So far, I have failed to find an effective countermeasure. I do not know if I will ever find one."

traits.locale_text: “我每次意识到真相之后的间隔越来越长了。过去，我大概每两个月就能揭开一次自己的秘密。很快，这个时间变成了四个月。现在则长达八个月。这表明我心智的退化正在加速。”{n}他抬起黯淡的目光看向你。{/n}“目前为止，我都没找到有效的应对措施，也不知道还能不能找得到。”

languages.text: « Les intervalles entre mes prises de conscience sont de plus en plus longs. Auparavant, je redécouvrais mon secret tous les deux mois environ. C'est rapidement passé à quatre. À présent, il me faut parfois jusqu'à huit mois. C'est le signe que la détérioration de mon esprit s'accélère. » {n}Il lève ses yeux inexpressifs vers vous.{/n} « Jusqu'ici, je n'ai pas réussi à trouver de contre-mesure efficace. J'ignore si j'y parviendrai un jour. »
languages.original_text: "The intervals between my realising the truth are becoming longer all the time. I used to uncover my secret about once every two months. That quickly turned into four. Now it takes as long as eight. This shows that the deterioration of my mind is accelerating." {n}He raises his colourless gaze to you.{/n} "So far, I have failed to find an effective countermeasure. I do not know if I will ever find one."

À présent, il me faut parfois jusqu'à huit mois. C'est le signe que la détérioration de mon esprit s'accélère. » {n}Il lève ses yeux inexpressifs vers vous.{/n} « Jusqu'ici, je n'ai pas réussi à trouver de contre-mesure efficace. J'ignore si j'y parviendrai un jour. »

languages.text: "Gerçeği idrak edişlerim arasındaki süre giderek uzuyor. Eskiden sırrımı yaklaşık iki ayda bir ortaya çıkarırdım. Sonra hızla dört oldu. Şimdiyse sekiz ayı buluyor. Bu da zihnimdeki bozulmanın hızlandığını gösteriyor." {n}Renksiz bakışlarını sana çeviriyor.{/n} "Şimdiye kadar etkili bir karşı önlem bulamadım. Bir gün bulabilir miyim, onu da bilmiyorum."
languages.original_text: "The intervals between my realising the truth are becoming longer all the time. I used to uncover my secret about once every two months. That quickly turned into four. Now it takes as long as eight. This shows that the deterioration of my mind is accelerating." {n}He raises his colourless gaze to you.{/n} "So far, I have failed to find an effective countermeasure. I do not know if I will ever find one."

traits.locale_text: "Gerçeği idrak edişlerim arasındaki süre giderek uzuyor. Eskiden sırrımı yaklaşık iki ayda bir ortaya çıkarırdım. Sonra hızla dört oldu. Şimdiyse sekiz ayı buluyor. Bu da zihnimdeki bozulmanın hızlandığını gösteriyor." {n}Renksiz bakışlarını sana çeviriyor.{/n} "Şimdiye kadar etkili bir karşı önlem bulamadım. Bir gün bulabilir miyim, onu da bilmiyorum."

languages.text: "Die Intervalle, in denen ich die Wahrheit erkenne, werden immer länger. Einst habe ich mein Geheimnis etwa alle zwei Monate gelüftet. Bald wurden vier daraus. Mittlerweile sind es acht. Das zeigt, dass sich der Verfall meines Verstandes beschleunigt." {n}Er richtet seinen farblosen Blick auf dich.{/n} "Bis dato konnte ich keine effektive Gegenmaßnahme finden. Keine Ahnung, ob ich sie je finden werde."
languages.original_text: "The intervals between my realising the truth are becoming longer all the time. I used to uncover my secret about once every two months. That quickly turned into four. Now it takes as long as eight. This shows that the deterioration of my mind is accelerating." {n}He raises his colourless gaze to you.{/n} "So far, I have failed to find an effective countermeasure. I do not know if I will ever find one."

traits.locale_text: "Die Intervalle, in denen ich die Wahrheit erkenne, werden immer länger. Einst habe ich mein Geheimnis etwa alle zwei Monate gelüftet. Bald wurden vier daraus. Mittlerweile sind es acht. Das zeigt, dass sich der Verfall meines Verstandes beschleunigt." {n}Er richtet seinen farblosen Blick auf dich.{/n} "Bis dato konnte ich keine effektive Gegenmaßnahme finden. Keine Ahnung, ob ich sie je finden werde."

languages.text: 「私が真実に気づくまでの間隔は、絶えず長くなっている。以前は二か月に一度ほど秘密を暴いていた。それがほどなく四か月になった。今では八か月もかかる。これは私の精神の劣化が加速していることを示している。」{n}彼は色のない視線を君に向ける。{/n}「今のところ、有効な対策は見つかっていない。今後見つかるかどうかも分からない。」
languages.original_text: "The intervals between my realising the truth are becoming longer all the time. I used to uncover my secret about once every two months. That quickly turned into four. Now it takes as long as eight. This shows that the deterioration of my mind is accelerating." {n}He raises his colourless gaze to you.{/n} "So far, I have failed to find an effective countermeasure. I do not know if I will ever find one."
